name: Air Sailor
description: Masters of airship travel and sky combat

name: Archer
description: Ranged combat specialists with exceptional precision

name: Beastmaster
description: Bonded with animals and nature, commanding beasts in battle

name: Cavalryman
description: Elite mounted warriors bonded with their steeds

name: Elementalist
description: Spellcasters who channel the four primal elements

name: Illusionist
description: Weavers of mist and shadow who bend perception

name: Nethermancer
description: Scholars of death and undead lore

name: Scout
description: Stealthy wilderness experts and information gatherers

name: Sky Raider
description: Fierce aerial raiders who seek glory in battle

name: Swordmaster
description: Elegant melee fighters with masterful weapon technique

name: Thief
description: Cunning rogues skilled in larceny and deception

name: Troubadour
description: Performers whose art channels the magic of Name

name: Warrior
description: Stalwart frontline fighters forged in the fires of battle

name: Weaponsmith
description: Artisans who imbue weapons with thread-magic

name: Wizard
description: Scholarly spellcasters who command the patterns of magic
